title: Login Authentication Error
description: User reports receiving a 500 error when attempting to log in via OAuth.

title: Invoice Export Failure
description: PDF generation fails when exporting invoices with more than 50 line items.

title: UI Alignment on Mobile
description: Navigation bar overlaps with content on iPhone 15 screens.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Reset links are expiring in 5 minutes instead of the documented 30 minutes.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is requesting a native dark mode for the web dashboard.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: Intermittent timeouts occurring during peak hours (14:00 - 16:00 EST).

title: Typo in API Documentation
description: The /v1/users endpoint documentation has a typo in the 'address' parameter.

title: Billing Query - Refund Request
description: Customer was double-charged for the February subscription cycle.

title: Missing Search Results
description: Searching for specific tags returns no results even when they exist.

title: Integrations Page Loading Slow
description: The integrations page takes over 10 seconds to load for accounts with many seats.

title: Account Suspension Appeal
description: Account suspended for suspected TOS violation; customer claims it is a mistake.

title: CSV Import Mapping Error
description: Date formats are not being parsed correctly during bulk user upload.
